data.title: LEHR emergency vehicle upfitter expands with new 40,000-square-foot facility in Houston, creating jobs and meeting demand in Texas.
data.description: In Houston, a new facility is set to open on October 9, 2025, by LEHR, the top emergency vehicle upfitter in the United States. It will cover 40,000 square feet and is expected to support the increasing demand for emergency vehicles in Texas. This expansion is anticipated to create new employment opportunities in the area due to the growing need for these specialized vehicles.

data.title: Hush Security launches new runtime certificate intelligence feature, detecting and replacing non post-quantum-compliant certificates.
data.description: Hush Security, based in Tel Aviv, Israel, revealed a significant enhancement to its Secretless Access Management Platform on October 9, 2025. The update includes automated runtime detection and substitution for non post-quantum-compliant certificates deemed high-risk. This development aims to bolster security measures implemented by Hush.

data.title: Magnolia Family Dentistry in Austin provides affordable dental care to residents without insurance, targeting seniors, gig workers, freelancers, musicians & artists with membership plans.
data.description: AUSTIN, Texas - On October 9, 2025, accessible services will be offered to a larger demographic, including seniors, gig workers, freelancers, musicians, and artists through membership plans. Recognized as the Live Music Capital of the country, Austin is home to numerous aspiring musicians and artists. This initiative aims to cater to the diverse needs of individuals in different professions and age groups.

data.title: Report exposes legal loopholes allowing child marriage in 34 US states; 314,000 children married between 2000-2021.
data.description: In the period from 2000 to 2021, a total of more than 314,000 minors were reported to have been married in the United States. Shockingly, some of these children were as young as 10 years old, with the majority being young girls. The findings of a recent report titled "Legal Gaps and Enduring Harm: Analyzing the Persistence of Child Marriage in the United States" shed light on this concerning issue, bringing attention to the need for addressing and preventing child marriages in the country.

data.title: Levi Strauss (NYSE: LEVI) releases Q3 earnings on Oct. 9 with expectation of 31 cents/share, $1.50B revenue; offers 2.27% dividend yield.
data.description: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) is set to reveal its third-quarter earnings after market close on Thursday, October 9. Analysts are predicting earnings of 31 cents per share, a decline from the previous year's 33 cents per share. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.50 billion, a decrease from $1.52 billion in the same period last year. The recent appointment of Chris Callieri as senior vice president and chief supply chain officer on August 19 has attracted attention. Investors are eyeing potential dividends, with Levi Strauss currently offering an annual dividend yield of 2.27%, equating to a quarterly-annual dividend amount of 14 cents per share.

data.title: PepsiCo beats Q3 earnings estimate with $2.29 EPS and $23.937B sales (+2.6% YoY), led by growth in NA and international markets.
data.description: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ: PEP) announced surpassing analyst expectations with third-quarter adjusted earnings of $2.29 per share, higher than the projected $2.26. Quarterly sales totaled $23.937 billion, marking a 2.6% increase compared to the previous year and surpassing the anticipated $23.827 billion. Chairman and CEO Ramon Laguarta attributed the growth to the resilience of the international business, improved momentum in North America Beverages, and the impacts of portfolio reshaping actions. Notable revenue performances include PepsiCo Foods North America (PFNA) reporting flat growth, PepsiCo Beverages North America (PBNA) increasing by 2%, and International Beverages Franchise (IB Franchise) maintaining stability. Latin America Foods (LatAm Foods) saw a 2% sales growth, while Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) experienced a 9% rise. Asia Pacific sales also increased by 2% during the quarter. data.title: Baird Medical's success at ACS Clinical Congress 2025 with growing interest in MWA technology; global leader in minimally invasive tech.
data.description: Baird Medical Investment Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: BDMD) recently completed its involvement in the American College of Surgeons event. The company, an innovator in minimally invasive Microwave Ablation (MWA) technology, is recognized globally. The success of its participation highlights its leadership in the field.

data.title: Tavant recognized as Major Player in IDC MarketScape for AI-Enabled Aftermarket Solutions; position confirmed in report for 2025.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Tavant, a renowned company specializing in AI-driven service life-cycle management solutions and digital engineering, has been identified as a Major Player in the highly respected IDC MarketScape report titled Worldwide AI-Enabled Aftermarket/Service Life-Cycle Management Platforms 2025 Vendor Assessment (document number: US52968025, released in September 2025). This recognition highlights Tavant's outstanding AI technology advancements and a wide-ranging suite of aftermarket services, catering to a diverse customer base.

data.title: UKG and Google Cloud team up to enhance AI for millions of users globally. Google Cloud to provide AI and data analytics.
data.description: In Lowell, Massachusetts, and Sunnyvale, California, UKG and Google Cloud have unveiled a significant enhancement of their partnership to promote the use of advanced AI among the large user base of UKG’s HR, payroll, and workforce management tools. This collaboration aims to empower the tens of millions of users by harnessing Google Cloud's AI and data analytics capabilities. UKG will utilize Gemini Enterprise, Gemini models, and BigQuery as its key tools to enhance UKG BryteTM AI agents throughout its Workforce Operating Platform, assisting organizations in improving efficiency and decision-making processes with cutting-edge technology.

data.title: Momentus receives $5.1M contract from NASA for space mission supporting materials production advancement.
data.description: Momentus Inc., a commercial space company based in San Jose, California, recently disclosed that it secured a $5.1 million contract from NASA's Flight Opportunities program on September 26. The contract aims to aid the Commercial Orbital System for Microgravity In-Space Crystallization (COSMIC) demonstration. This innovative technology harnesses the microgravity conditions in space to progress advancements in various fields. Momentus Inc., listed on the NASDAQ as MNTS, offers a range of services including satellites, satellite components, and in-space transportation.

data.title: Developers of Ethereum debut Kohaku roadmap to bolster wallet security & privacy, offering modular tools & decentralized transactions handling.
data.description: Developers for Ethereum have recently launched a new system called Kohaku to bolster wallet security and privacy. This feature includes modular tools, zero-knowledge recovery options, and decentralized transaction processing.
